channel.title: Ofertas Diarias de Audio Plugin Guy (2026-03-01)
channel.description: Resumen de las mejores ofertas y freebies del d?a 2026-03-01.

item.title: [SAVE BIG] Future Audio Workshop|Get 85% off SubLab by Future Audio Workshop. The discounted price is $10.?NEW
item.description: Descuento: 85% - Desarrollador: Future Audio Workshop - Finaliza: 2026-03-15

item.title: [SAVE BIG] Harrison Consoles|Get 83% off 32C Bus by Harrison Consoles. The discounted price is $24.99.?NEW

item.title: [SAVE BIG] HoRNet Plugins|HoRNet Plugins is offering 80% off on all plugins (except the newly released VHS MK2). Use the code: ALMOST80.?ENDSSOON!?NEW
